mano_cua.result_summary: 项目要求 bun@1.3.3 作为 packageManager，本机未安装 bun。npm 报 EUNSUPPORTEDPROTOCOL (catalog:)，pnpm 报 Unsupported package manager specification (bun@1.3.3)。无法安装依赖，无法部署。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Project requires bun@1.3.3 as packageManager. bun not installed. npm rejects catalog: protocol, pnpm rejects bun specification. Cannot install dependencies.
